/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -std=c++11 -fPIC -Wno-deprecated-declarations -Wno-unused-variable -DOPENCV -std=c++11 -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libkernels.so -o libkernels.so CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernels/kernels_generated_activation_elu.cu.o CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernels/kernels_generated_activation_leaky.cu.o CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernels/kernels_generated_activation_logistic.cu.o CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernels/kernels_generated_activation_mish.cu.o CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernels/kernels_generated_activation_relu_ceiling.cu.o CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernels/kernels_generated_activation_sigmoid.cu.o CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernels/kernels_generated_convert.cu.o CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernels/kernels_generated_deformable_conv.cu.o CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernels/kernels_generated_fill.cu.o CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernels/kernels_generated_normalize.cu.o CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernels/kernels_generated_pooling.cu.o CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernels/kernels_generated_postprocessing.cu.o CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernels/kernels_generated_reorg.cu.o CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernels/kernels_generated_resize.cu.o CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernels/kernels_generated_scaladd.cu.o CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernels/kernels_generated_shortcut.cu.o CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernels/kernels_generated_softmax.cu.o CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernels/kernels_generated_upsample.cu.o CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/kernels_intermediate_link.o   -L/usr/local/TensorRT-7.2.1.6/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/TensorRT-7.2.1.6/lib: /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudadevrt.a -lpthread
